hero.title: Resolve disputes in 30 seconds
hero.description: First autonomous AI arbitrator on Solana blockchain. Funds in escrow, AI analyzes evidence under Kazakhstan laws

features.escrowDesc: SOL frozen in smart contract, released only by AI verdict
features.aiDesc: Analyzes evidence under 20+ Kazakhstan laws in seconds
features.transparentDesc: All decisions recorded on-chain, verifiable on Solana Explorer
features.fastDesc: No courts or lawyers. Resolution in 30 seconds
